name: Ostrumite Gunner
shortDescription: Frontline martial–inventors who wield a bonded gunblade powered by volatile Ostrumite energy.
description: Ostrumite Gunners bond to a unique gunblade fueled by volatile Ostrumite energy. Blending melee dominance with firearm precision, they control battlefield momentum through movement, pressure, and calculated overcharge.

ostrumiteCharges.label: Ostrumite Charges
ostrumiteCharges.description: Volatile energy generated from Ostrumite, used to fuel mods and subclass abilities.

features.name: Ostrumite Gunblade
features.description: You construct and bond to a unique Ostrumite Gunblade. It counts as one weapon for all class features. You may use Strength or Dexterity for both melee and firearm attacks. The firearm mode releases condensed Ostrumite force and requires no ammunition or reload. Only you can use its special properties. If destroyed, it can be rebuilt during a long rest. You begin with 2 gunblade mod slots.

features.name: Ostrumite Charges
features.description: You generate Ostrumite Charges equal to your Proficiency Bonus + Intelligence modifier (minimum 1). You regain all charges on a short or long rest. Charges fuel mods and subclass abilities; your base combat abilities never require charges.

features.name: Opening Salvo
features.description: When you roll initiative, you may make one firearm attack against a creature you can see. This attack does not use your action or reaction.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: You can attack twice when you take the Attack action. When you do so, one attack may be a firearm attack and one may be a melee attack, in any order.

features.name: Driving Shot
features.description: Once per turn when you hit a creature with a firearm attack, you may move up to 20 feet toward that creature without provoking opportunity attacks.

features.name: Sweeping Presence
features.description: Once per turn when you hit a creature with a melee attack, you may deal additional damage equal to your Intelligence modifier + Proficiency Bonus to a different creature within 5 feet of you.

features.name: Ostrumite Stability
features.description: You can exceed safe charge expenditure by 1 additional charge before risking instability. This feature primarily supports mods and subclass abilities.

features.name: Focused Barrage
features.description: Once per turn, when you take the Attack action and both attacks target the same creature, one hit deals an additional 1d8 force damage.

features.name: Hold the Line
features.description: Creatures provoke opportunity attacks from you even if they take the Disengage action.

features.name: Relentless Momentum
features.description: When you reduce a creature to 0 hit points, you may move up to half your speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

features.name: Overwhelming Assault
features.description: Once per turn when you hit a creature with a melee attack, you may immediately make one firearm attack against the same creature. This does not use an action.

features.name: Living Ostrumite Engine
features.description: When you roll initiative and have 0 Ostrumite Charges, you regain half your maximum charges. Once per turn when you score a critical hit or reduce a creature to 0 HP, you regain 1 Ostrumite Charge. Damage you take from Ostrumite instability or overcharge effects is halved.
